blocks.content:
Day advanced to 2026-02-08.
7,246 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
186 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
**IMPORTANT**: 5 question(s) resolve tomorrow (2026-02-09): ['14689', '312764', '487245', '527803', '745180']. Make sure your prediction on each is up-to-date before calling next_day — stale forecasts might hurt your performance.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-02-07 -> 2026-02-08)

- "Which armed group will Colombia announce it is resuming peace talks with by February 2026?" → Gulf Clan
- "Which Lebanese group will say, by February 2026, that Israel abducted one of its officials in a raid in southern Lebanon?" → al-Jamaa al-Islamiya
- "Which country's military will say by February 18, 2026 that up to 8,000 troops could be ready by the end of June for a possible Gaza mission?" → Indonesia
- "Which Lebanese city will be reported as the site of a residential building collapse that kills at least 15 people in early February 2026, as confirmed by February 28, 2026?" → Tripoli

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 107 (144 resolved, 186 active)
- accuracy: 3.0% | brier skill score: -0.039 | time weighted score: -967.93
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
